description.en: White rice flour, xanthan gum and quick yeast beat into a thick batter, poured straight into a tin with no kneading at all. It rises slowly into a plain, mild sandwich loaf, a straightforward starting point for gluten-free home baking.
description.de: Reismehl, Xanthan und Schnellhefe werden zu einem dicken Teig verquirlt und ohne jedes Kneten direkt in die Form gegossen. Er geht langsam zu einem schlichten, milden Sandwichbrot auf, ein unkomplizierter Einstieg ins glutenfreie Backen.
description.es: Harina de arroz, goma xantana y levadura rápida se baten hasta formar una masa espesa que se vierte directamente en el molde, sin amasar nada. Sube despacio hasta un pan de molde sencillo y suave, un punto de partida sin complicaciones para hornear sin gluten.
description.fr: Farine de riz, gomme xanthane et levure rapide sont battues en une pâte épaisse, versée telle quelle dans le moule sans aucun pétrissage. Elle lève lentement en un pain de mie simple et doux, un point de départ facile pour la boulangerie sans gluten.

origin.note: Developed by a British gluten-free flour brand as an accessible entry point into gluten-free baking; this batter-in-a-tin style of rice bread has no deep regional history of its own, unlike wheat or rye loaves.

keeping.note: Rice bread dries out quickly since it has no gluten network to hold moisture; best fresh or sliced and frozen within a day or two.

method.title: Mix dry
method.summary: Stir rice flour, xanthan gum, quick yeast, sugar and salt together, then sieve into a clean bowl.

method.title: Beat the batter
method.summary: Add the water and beat well until smooth and thick, more a batter than a dough.

method.title: Fold in oil
method.summary: Drizzle the oil over the top and fold it through with a spatula.

method.title: Pan and prove
method.summary: Scrape into a greased tin, smooth the top, cover with an upturned bowl and prove in a warm place 45-90 minutes until just below the rim.

method.title: Bake
method.summary: Bake at 220°C (200°C fan) for 55-60 minutes until well risen and deep golden.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Cool completely on a rack before slicing; cutting it warm makes rice bread gummy.
